blocks.content: By the second week, every table in the cafeteria had calcified into a fixed social unit.
Their table was in the middle section — Kit and Eli on one side, Daisy and Savannah across. On Tuesday, Brooke Hadley stopped at the end of the table and looked at the open seat next to Eli.
She sat down. Eli introduced everyone. Brooke smiled at Daisy, who smiled back, then turned to Kit. Daisy looked at her tray.

blocks.speaker: Brooke
blocks.content: Eli says you guys have been friends since like forever.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: It truly is. I basically raised them.
After lunch, in the hallway, Savannah fell into step beside Daisy.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: She was looking at Kit the whole time.
